title: prunus domestica var. cerasifera
intro: Prunus domestica var. cerasifera, also known as the Morello cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Prunus genus. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Morello cherry include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions and gastrointestinal problems.
